app.name: Maobu Fetch
app.aboutDescLine1: A local-first, compact and efficient Windows download manager.
app.aboutDescLine2: Supports multi-threaded concurrent HTTP Range connections and browser download takeover.

empty.noHistoryTasksDesc: Completed tasks older than the archive threshold, or older tasks exceeding the main list limit, will be moved here automatically.
empty.noTasksDesc: Add a link, or send a download from the Chrome / Edge extension.
empty.noSegmentsDesc: This task does not use multi-connection, or has not started downloading.

details.title: Details
details.notSelectedDesc: Select a download task in the list to view its detailed parameters and segment connections.
details.selectedCountDesc: Select a single task to view detailed download information and segment connection status.
details.priorityHint: Lower numbers run first; with a global speed limit, high/normal/low tasks share bandwidth at 4:2:1 weights
details.securityNote: Sensitive credentials (Cookie, Authorization, etc.) are hidden.
details.remoteChangedDesc: The ETag or Last-Modified returned by the server does not match the recorded values. Continuing the resume would stitch old segments onto the new resource, so the download has been blocked. Choose how to proceed:
details.redownloadHint: Delete old shards and download the new resource from scratch
details.keepOldFile: Keep old file and cancel task
details.keepOldFileHint: Keep the downloaded file and shards, cancel the task
details.meteredPausedDesc: The system detected a metered (pay-by-traffic) network and automatically paused this task to avoid consuming data. Click "Resume download" to continue on the current network; once resumed, the task will not be auto-paused again until the network becomes non-metered.
details.resumeDownloadHint: Continue downloading on the current network without auto-pausing again
details.tempAuthHint: This task carries the current page Cookie/Referer/User-Agent from the browser extension, used only for this download and cleared on completion.

toasts.dragPriorityHint: Please use the context menu or numeric priority to adjust
toasts.customProxyEmpty: Custom proxy URL cannot be empty
toasts.noTagsCreated: No tags created yet. Add them in Settings.
toasts.frostedGlassFailed: Failed to apply frosted glass effect: {error}

dialogs.deleteRecordOnlyDesc: Remove the download record from the list, keeping the downloaded local files.
dialogs.deleteRecordAndFileDesc: Remove the record from the list and permanently delete the downloaded files from disk.
dialogs.forceDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected {count} tasks and their files?
dialogs.forceDeleteConfirm: This will permanently delete {count} tasks and their files. This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.closeQuestion: What should happen when closing the window?

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Language switch takes effect immediately; it does not affect saved tasks, settings, or the database.
settings.notifySoundDesc: The completion sound is an ascending triad C5->E5->G5; the failure sound is a descending triad G5->E5->C5. Sounds are generated via the Web Audio API, no audio asset files are bundled. Failure notifications also pop up an in-app toast with a "Retry now" button.
settings.archiveDaysLabel: Archive days (completed tasks older than N days are archived)
settings.archiveThresholdLabel: Main list completed task limit (oldest archived beyond M entries)
settings.archiveDesc: The main list only keeps recent active tasks; tasks completed beyond the configured days, or completed tasks beyond the main list limit, will be automatically moved to the History view. The History view supports its own filtering and clearing, and never modifies task target files. Set to 0 to disable the corresponding rule.
settings.lowMemoryMode: Low memory mode (1 task, max 2 connections per task)
settings.lowMemoryDesc: Low memory mode uses smaller merge buffers and a smaller connection pool; it does not change your concurrency preferences, and reverts automatically when turned off.
settings.maxRetries: Max retries (legacy field, only for task-level fallback)
settings.proxyDesc: Proxy passwords are encrypted via Windows DPAPI before being stored, only the current Windows user can decrypt them; the PAC script path is only read by the OS in "Follow system" mode. The task details panel can configure per-task proxy overrides.
settings.retryPolicyDesc: Connection timeout applies to reqwest connect_timeout; total task timeout takes precedence over connection retries and forces failure when exceeded; max retries is counted per connection; during backoff, connections stay inactive and do not consume server resources. Tasks can override this default in the details panel.
settings.networkAwarenessDesc: Checks the system network metered status every 60 seconds; when a metered (pay-by-traffic) network is detected and the toggle is on, downloading tasks are automatically paused and a notification is shown. After a manual resume, tasks will not be auto-paused again until the network becomes non-metered. On detection failure, it safely falls back to non-metered and never wrongly pauses tasks.
settings.interceptBrowserDownloads: Allow browser extension to take over downloads
settings.pairingHint: Enter this one-time pairing code in the extension (valid for 10 minutes)
settings.mediaToolsDesc: Components are looked up in the order: custom path -> app install -> Windows PATH. External components are only referenced, Maobu Fetch will not copy, update, or delete them.
settings.mediaToolAutoUpdate: Automatically check for media tool updates
settings.detailDefaultCollapsed: Collapse details panel by default (on task switch)
settings.appearanceDesc: Color scheme can follow the system or force light/dark; compact row height reduces each row to 32px with slightly smaller font; enabling "Collapse details panel by default" hides the details panel on task switch, but it can still be expanded manually.
settings.windowSizeDesc: Frosted glass uses the native Windows 10/11 Acrylic material; auto scaling enlarges the UI based on the window width.
settings.taskMigrationDesc: The export file does not include request headers, credentials, absolute save paths, or download progress; imported tasks are paused by default and saved to the directory you choose. Time-signed links may need to be re-acquired.
settings.backupRestoreDesc: Backups include settings, category rules, filename cleanup rules, download presets, URL history, and the task list. By default, Cookie, Authorization, and proxy passwords are not exported; if "Include credentials" is checked, the backup file is encrypted with AES-256-GCM. A preview of added, overwritten, and skipped entries is shown before restore; existing tasks are skipped and user progress is not overwritten.
settings.logsDesc: Logs roll over daily and are retained for 7 days; Cookie, Authorization, proxy passwords, and URL tokens are automatically redacted on write; exports are redacted again. The log directory path is never exposed to the frontend.
settings.taskTimeoutSecs: Total task timeout (seconds; leave empty for no limit)
settings.latestAlready: You are on the latest version{remote}
settings.updateCheckDesc: Clicking "Check for updates" queries GitHub Releases for the latest version number and release notes; it does not automatically download or install. If a new version is found, please go to GitHub Releases manually to download and verify the SHA-256.

errors.runDesktopApp: Please run the Maobu Fetch desktop app

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts Settings
shortcuts.desc: Use keyboard shortcuts in the task list for efficient management. Click a key box and press a new key combination to record; shortcuts automatically pause when input fields are focused to prevent accidental triggers.
